idea-plugin.name: FAH Failure Sound
idea-plugin.description:
**FaahException** gives you instant sound feedback for key IntelliJ events, so you can hear failures, warnings, and successes without constantly watching build output.
**Highlights:** - Configurable sounds for Build, Run/Debug, Gradle, and Maven events - Separate triggers for `failed`, `warning`, and `success` - Per-event sound selection, per-event max playback duration (`Max ms`), and a built-in test button - Support for bundled sounds and custom `.mp3`/`.wav` files from your custom sound folder - Global controls for volume, debounce, and optional notifications
A focused workflow helper for developers who want faster feedback while coding.
